title: Martial Arts Man deals twenty damage after hit

card.rawText: On hit, play this card from your hand. Inflict 20 damage to the creature you are battling.

plan.title: Martial Arts Man deals twenty damage after hit
plan.summary: After a successful hit, play Martial Arts Man from hand and verify the battling creature takes its 20 direct damage before battle damage completes.

notes: Martial Arts Man is in player_1 hand before combat.

steps: In the post-hit Lightning window, play Martial Arts Man.
Resolve Martial Arts Man's direct damage and the normal battle damage.

expectedAssertions.label: Defender HP reduced by direct and battle damage
Martial Arts Man goes to cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm the card cannot be played before a hit lands.
riskNotes: Expected HP assumes 20 direct damage plus 2 normal battle damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
